SEARCH

Package inference

package inference
  • Class
    Description
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: service InferenceService @@ @@ Inference Server GRPC endpoints.
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc.AsyncService
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: service InferenceService @@ @@ Inference Server GRPC endpoints.
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc.GRPCInferenceServiceBlockingStub
    A stub to allow clients to do synchronous rpc calls to service GRPCInferenceService.
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc.GRPCInferenceServiceFutureStub
    A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service GRPCInferenceService.
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc.GRPCInferenceServiceImplBase
    Base class for the server implementation of the service GRPCInferenceService.
    GRPCInferenceServiceGrpc.GRPCInferenceServiceStub
    A stub to allow clients to do asynchronous rpc calls to service GRPCInferenceService.

    ModelConfigOuterClass
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchInput
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message BatchInput @@ @@ A batch input is an additional input that must be added by @@ the backend based on all the requests in a batch.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchInput.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message BatchInput @@ @@ A batch input is an additional input that must be added by @@ the backend based on all the requests in a batch.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchInput.Kind
    @@ @@ .. cpp:enum:: Kind @@ @@ The kind of the batch input.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchInputOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchOutput
    @@.. cpp:var:: message BatchOutput @@ @@ A batch output is an output produced by the model that must be handled @@ differently by the backend based on all the requests in a batch.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchOutput.Builder
    @@.. cpp:var:: message BatchOutput @@ @@ A batch output is an output produced by the model that must be handled @@ differently by the backend based on all the requests in a batch.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchOutput.Kind
    @@ @@ .. cpp:enum:: Kind @@ @@ The kind of the batch output.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.BatchOutputOrBuilder

    @@ @@.. cpp:enum:: DataType @@ @@ Data types supported for input and output tensors.

    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Step @@ @@ Each step specifies a model included in the ensemble, @@ maps ensemble tensor names to the model input tensors, @@ and maps model output tensors to ensemble tensor names @@
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelEnsembling.Step.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Step @@ @@ Each step specifies a model included in the ensemble, @@ maps ensemble tensor names to the model input tensors, @@ and maps model output tensors to ensemble tensor names @@

    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Accelerator @@ @@ Specify the accelerator to be used to execute the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.ExecutionAccelerators.AcceleratorOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.ExecutionAccelerators.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message ExecutionAccelerators @@ @@ Specify the preferred execution accelerators to be used to execute @@ the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.ExecutionAcceleratorsOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.Graph
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Graph @@ @@ Enable generic graph optimization of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.Graph.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Graph @@ @@ Enable generic graph optimization of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.GraphOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.ModelPriority
    @@ @@ .. cpp:enum:: ModelPriority @@ @@ Model priorities.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.PinnedMemoryBuffer
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message PinnedMemoryBuffer @@ @@ Specify whether to use a pinned memory buffer when transferring data @@ between non-pinned system memory and GPU memory.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.PinnedMemoryBuffer.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message PinnedMemoryBuffer @@ @@ Specify whether to use a pinned memory buffer when transferring data @@ between non-pinned system memory and GPU memory.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicy.PinnedMemoryBufferOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOptimizationPolicyOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOutput
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelOutput @@ @@ An output produced by the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOutput.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelOutput @@ @@ An output produced by the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelOutputOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelParameter
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelParameter @@ @@ A model parameter.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelParameter.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelParameter @@ @@ A model parameter.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelParameterOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelQueuePolicy
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelQueuePolicy @@ @@ Queue policy for inference requests.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelQueuePolicy.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelQueuePolicy @@ @@ Queue policy for inference requests.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelQueuePolicy.TimeoutAction
    @@ @@ .. cpp:enum:: TimeoutAction @@ @@ The action applied to timed-out requests.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelQueuePolicyOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiter
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message ModelRateLimiter @@ @@ The specifications required by the rate limiter to properly @@ schedule the inference requests across the different models @@ and their instances.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiter.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message ModelRateLimiter @@ @@ The specifications required by the rate limiter to properly @@ schedule the inference requests across the different models @@ and their instances.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiter.Resource
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Resource @@ @@ The resource property.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiter.Resource.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Resource @@ @@ The resource property.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiter.ResourceOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRateLimiterOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgents
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelRepositoryAgents @@ @@ The repository agents for the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgents.Agent
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Agent @@ @@ A repository agent that should be invoked for the specified @@ repository actions for this model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgents.Agent.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Agent @@ @@ A repository agent that should be invoked for the specified @@ repository actions for this model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgents.AgentOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgents.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelRepositoryAgents @@ @@ The repository agents for the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelRepositoryAgentsOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelResponseCache
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelResponseCache @@ @@ The response cache setting for the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelResponseCache.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelResponseCache @@ @@ The response cache setting for the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelResponseCacheOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelSequenceBatching @@ @@ Sequence batching configuration.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelSequenceBatching @@ @@ Sequence batching configuration.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.Control
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Control @@ @@ A control is a signal that the sequence batcher uses to @@ communicate with a backend.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.Control.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Control @@ @@ A control is a signal that the sequence batcher uses to @@ communicate with a backend.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.Control.Kind
    @@ @@ .. cpp:enum:: Kind @@ @@ The kind of the control.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.ControlInput
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message ControlInput @@ @@ The sequence control values to communicate by a model input.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.ControlInput.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message ControlInput @@ @@ The sequence control values to communicate by a model input.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.ControlInputOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.ControlOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.InitialState
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message InitialState @@ @@ Settings used to initialize data for implicit state.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.InitialState.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message InitialState @@ @@ Settings used to initialize data for implicit state.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.InitialState.StateDataCase
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.InitialStateOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.State
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message State @@ @@ An input / output pair of tensors that carry state for the sequence.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.State.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message State @@ @@ An input / output pair of tensors that carry state for the sequence.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StateOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyChoiceCase
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyDirect
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message StrategyDirect @@ @@ The sequence batcher uses a specific, unique batch @@ slot for each sequence.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyDirect.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message StrategyDirect @@ @@ The sequence batcher uses a specific, unique batch @@ slot for each sequence.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyDirectOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyOldest
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message StrategyOldest @@ @@ The sequence batcher maintains up to 'max_candidate_sequences' @@ candidate sequences.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyOldest.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message StrategyOldest @@ @@ The sequence batcher maintains up to 'max_candidate_sequences' @@ candidate sequences.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatching.StrategyOldestOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelSequenceBatchingOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTensorReshape
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelTensorReshape @@ @@ Reshape specification for input and output tensors.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTensorReshape.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelTensorReshape @@ @@ Reshape specification for input and output tensors.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTensorReshapeOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTransactionPolicy
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message ModelTransactionPolicy @@ @@ The specification that describes the nature of transactions @@ to be expected from the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTransactionPolicy.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message ModelTransactionPolicy @@ @@ The specification that describes the nature of transactions @@ to be expected from the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelTransactionPolicyOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelVersionPolicy @@ @@ Policy indicating which versions of a model should be made @@ available by the inference server.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.All
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message All @@ @@ Serve all versions of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.All.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message All @@ @@ Serve all versions of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.AllOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelVersionPolicy @@ @@ Policy indicating which versions of a model should be made @@ available by the inference server.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.Latest
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Latest @@ @@ Serve only the latest version(s) of a model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.Latest.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Latest @@ @@ Serve only the latest version(s) of a model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.LatestOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.PolicyChoiceCase
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.Specific
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Specific @@ @@ Serve only specific versions of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.Specific.Builder
    @@ .. cpp:var:: message Specific @@ @@ Serve only specific versions of the model.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicy.SpecificOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelVersionPolicyOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelWarmup @@ @@ Settings used to construct the request sample for model warmup.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup.Builder
    @@ @@.. cpp:var:: message ModelWarmup @@ @@ Settings used to construct the request sample for model warmup.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup.Input
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Input @@ @@ Meta data associated with an input.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup.Input.Builder
    @@ @@ .. cpp:var:: message Input @@ @@ Meta data associated with an input.
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup.Input.InputDataTypeCase
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmup.InputOrBuilder
     
    ModelConfigOuterClass.ModelWarmupOrBuilder
